title: Test Edge 4 (Fan-In Collect)
cap_description: Collect list of node4 items into single node5 output
documentation:
## Purpose

Internal test cap. Exercises fan-in behavior by collecting a list of node4 text items into a single node5 output, concatenating them with an optional separator.

## Inputs

- A list of node4 text items.
- An optional separator string (default: space).

## Outputs

A single merged node5 text.

## Notes

- Not for production use. Used only in capfab test scenarios to verify fan-in routing.

args.arg_description: List of text items to collect

output.output_description: Single merged text from all list items
